summary: Iteration 161: Shared Service Layer Refactoring (v78.0.0) - All tests PASSED. Shared JS modules (party-helpers.js, paddy-calc.js, payment-service.js) work correctly in both desktop-app and local-server. Web backend APIs (private-paddy, private-payments, quick-search) working. Frontend Quick Search and version v78.0.0 verified.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: party-helpers.js makePartyLabel dedup logic works correctly - 'Kridha (Kesinga)' + 'Kesinga' = 'Kridha (Kesinga)' (no duplicate)
PASS: party-helpers.js fmtDetail formats quantity correctly - '10 Qntl @ Rs.2500'
PASS: paddy-calc.js calcPaddyAuto computes all fields correctly (qntl, gbw_cut, mill_w, moisture_cut, cutting, final_w, total_amount, balance)
PASS: payment-service.js exports all 8 functions correctly
PASS: payment-service.js computePaymentStatus sets 'paid' when paid_amount >= total_amount
PASS: desktop-app/routes/private_trading.js loads successfully with shared modules
PASS: local-server/routes/private_trading.js loads successfully with shared modules
PASS: Web backend POST /api/private-paddy creates entry with auto-calculated fields
PASS: Web backend GET /api/private-paddy returns entries with payment_status field
PASS: Web backend POST /api/private-payments creates payment and updates entry balance
PASS: Web backend DELETE /api/private-payments/:id reverses balance correctly
PASS: Web backend GET /api/quick-search returns grouped results from 13 collections
PASS: Frontend Quick Search button visible with 'Search...Ctrl+K' hint
PASS: Frontend Quick Search dialog opens on click and Ctrl+K
PASS: Frontend search results grouped by category (Mill Entries, Cash Book, etc.)
PASS: Frontend keyboard navigation (Arrow keys, ESC) works
PASS: Frontend version shows v78.0.0 in header and footer
PASS: WhatsNew dialog shows v78.0.0 changelog with Quick Search + Shared Service Layer features

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Quick Search UI tests passed

context_for_next_testing_agent: Shared service layer refactoring complete. The shared modules (party-helpers.js, paddy-calc.js, payment-service.js) are in /app/desktop-app/shared/ and /app/local-server/shared/. Both directories have identical copies. The web backend (Python/MongoDB) was NOT changed - only the JS backends were refactored. Quick Search feature fully tested in iteration 160.

frontend.quick_search_dialog: PASS - opens on click and Ctrl+K
frontend.version_display: PASS - v78.0.0 in header and footer
